title: Statement on Significant benchmarks notified under Article 24(2) of the Benchmark Regulation- MSCI Limited
text:
17 March 2026
ESMA81-1841807023-1063
Public Statement
Significant benchmarks notified under Article 24(2) of
the Benchmark Regulation
ESMA has received a notification from the administrator MSCI Limited pursuant to Article 24(2)
of the Benchmark Regulation (BMR)1 stating that the below benchmarks have reached the
threshold of EUR 50 billion referred to in Article 24(1) of the BMR.
Following receipt of the notification, ESMA is publishing this statement in accordance
with Article 24(2) of the BMR to specify that the following benchmarks are significant
according to Article 24(1), point (a), of the BMR:

Next steps:
ESMA will update the ESMA register to include the different relevant characteristics of these
benchmarks as significant pursuant to Article 24(2) of the BMR.
